title: New Company Incorporation
hero_desc: Professional and seamless execution of your New Company Incorporation in the UAE. We eliminate the red tape so you can focus on growth.
about_title: Why choose our New Company Incorporation service?
about_desc: Navigating the administrative landscape in Dubai requires precision. Our dedicated experts handle every technicality of your New Company Incorporation, ensuring 100% compliance with local laws, incredibly fast turnaround times, and total peace of mind.
requirements: Passport copy of shareholders and directors
Proposed business names (3 options)
Outline of planned business activities
NOC from current sponsor (if UAE resident)
Proof of residence (utility bill)

steps.title: Jurisdiction Advisory
steps.desc: Selecting the perfect Free Zone, Mainland, or Offshore authority for your goals.

steps.title: Application Filing
steps.desc: Preparing the Memorandum of Association (MOA) and submitting shareholder details.

steps.title: Corporate Bank Account
steps.desc: Connecting you with premium banking partners for seamless account opening.

steps.title: Final Company Documents
steps.desc: Receiving your License, Certificate of Incorporation, and Share Certificates.

about_desc: Navigating the administrative landscape in Dubai requires precision. Our dedicated experts handle every technicality of your Investor Visa Services, ensuring 100% compliance with local laws, incredibly fast turnaround times, and total peace of mind.
requirements: Clear color copy of passport (minimum 6 months validity)
Passport-size photographs with white background
Sponsor's Emirates ID and Visa copy (for dependents)

steps.title: Status Change
steps.desc: If inside the UAE, we process your status change without needing to exit the country.

steps.title: Medical Fitness Test
steps.desc: We schedule and guide you through the mandatory VIP or standard medical testing.

steps.title: Emirates ID & Visa Stamping
steps.desc: Biometrics registration followed by the final residence visa issuance.

title: MOA Drafting & Notarization
hero_desc: Professional and seamless execution of your MOA Drafting & Notarization in the UAE. We eliminate the red tape so you can focus on growth.
about_title: Why choose our MOA Drafting & Notarization service?
about_desc: Navigating the administrative landscape in Dubai requires precision. Our dedicated experts handle every technicality of your MOA Drafting & Notarization, ensuring 100% compliance with local laws, incredibly fast turnaround times, and total peace of mind.
requirements: Original documents to be processed/attested
Passport and Visa copies of involved parties
Company Trade License
Authorization letter / Power of Attorney

steps.title: Document Collection
steps.desc: Secure pickup of your original documents from your location.

steps.title: Translation & Typing
steps.desc: Legally translating and formatting documents for government acceptance.

steps.title: Authority Submission
steps.desc: Processing through Notary Public, MOFA, or respective Embassies.

steps.title: Secure Delivery
steps.desc: Safe return of your attested, legally stamped documents directly to you.

title: VAT Registration & Filing
hero_desc: Professional and seamless execution of your VAT Registration & Filing in the UAE. We eliminate the red tape so you can focus on growth.
about_title: Why choose our VAT Registration & Filing service?
about_desc: Navigating the administrative landscape in Dubai requires precision. Our dedicated experts handle every technicality of your VAT Registration & Filing, ensuring 100% compliance with local laws, incredibly fast turnaround times, and total peace of mind.
requirements: Copy of Trade License and MOA
Emirates ID of the authorized signatory
Company Bank Statements (last 6-12 months)
Existing financial records or ledgers
Tenancy contract (Ejari)

steps.title: Financial Assessment
steps.desc: Our accountants review your current financial standing and corporate records.

steps.title: Documentation Preparation
steps.desc: We organize, audit, and compile your books according to UAE IFRS standards.

steps.title: Portal Submission
steps.desc: Filing your returns, reports, or registration via the Federal Tax Authority (FTA) portal.

steps.title: Compliance Confirmation
steps.desc: Delivering your Tax Registration Number (TRN) or final audit clearance reports.
